# Deos Originals
> Creative marketing agency based in Mysuru, India. We specialize in branding, content creation, performance marketing, and brand launches.

## About
Deos Originals is a full-service creative marketing agency. The name is derived from Latin — "Deos" means gods, combined with "Originals" to represent work elevated beyond the ordinary. We create with authority, precision, and originality — building brands that stand on their own.

## Services
- Website & App Development: Web design, app development, UI/UX, CMS integration
- Branding: Logo design, color systems, typography, brand direction
- Brand Launches & Store Launches: Launch strategy, campaign planning, store openings, PR events
- Promo Shoots & Ads: Photography, video ads, creative direction, post-production
- Movie Screen Ads: Cinema advertising, cinematic production, brand films, screen media
- PR & Influencer Marketing: Press coverage, influencer campaigns, brand partnerships
- Meta Management: Facebook & Instagram ads, audience targeting, performance marketing

## Clients
Greeco, Lounge 29, Mystuc Tavern, Pataka, SVJ, The Pearl, Sunburn Union, White Teak, Elan Bar, Gokulam, Royal Blu, SMSL, Mumbai Chai

## Team
Ashwij Donthi, Thanush S Gowda, Hemanth Rakki, Sandesh Shaiva, Nayana Rahuth, Asher Shalom, Ayush Naik
